---
title: "Introduction to Network Analysis"
format: html
previous:
  href: "../index.qmd"
  text: "Home"

next:
  href: "intro-what_is_a_network.qmd"
  text: "What is a Network"
---
## Learning Outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   explain what a network is and how it represents relationships
-   describe networks using key terminology (nodes, edges, ties, dyads)
-   differentiate between types of ties and relationships
-   interpret basic network visualisations



------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
